cases.prompt: 이번 주 회고 돌려줘, 뭐 출시했는지 정리해줘

assertions.text: Analyzes commit history and work patterns to produce a weekly engineering retrospective.
Tracks trends across persistent retro history rather than a one-off snapshot.

cases.prompt: Run an engineering retrospective and show what we shipped this sprint.

assertions.text: Summarizes what shipped over the period from commit history and code quality metrics.
Is team-aware: breaks down per-person contributions with praise and growth areas when multiple committers exist.
